title: Lindsaea schlechtendalii
taxonomy: Lindsaea schlechtendalii is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant belongs to the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. It is further categorized under the division Pteridophyta, which comprises all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. At the kingdom level, Lindsaea schlechtendalii is classified as Plantae, encompassing all land plants. Overall, its classification reflects its position within the fern lineage.
